column1: C[sirpop: This is sustaining me until Sunday. i love it
C[pete: The upper left was certainly to your advantage.  I should've known better than to play D14
C[sirpop: I don't think that hurt you so much.
C[sirpop: Does the server record the games? How did we get here?
C[pete: Yes, the server has a record of the game.  You can view past moves with the arrow buttons above.
C[sirpop: thanks. i'm going to want to look at this when it's over
C[sirpop: slow day at the office?
C[pete: Actually, having an emergency that requires frequent, but not constant attention.
C[pete: Working from home, and one of our devs just found a large bug in an app that was just about to go live.
C[pete: only good in the sense that it could have been worse.  the app is already behind schedule, and this will add several days.
C[pete: that's a nice little shape you just concocted, making good use of E6's aji
C[pete: Yeah, I thought you could break out, but then I saw I could threaten the H9 group
pete: that was devious on my part.
C[sirpop: undo, please. I got a phone call
sirpop: I have screwed the game up
C[pete: just saw your message... I don't think there is undo on this server.
C[sirpop: I think we're back on track.
C[sirpop: I have to go out for a half hour or so
C[pete: ok, no prob... I might be out for a while as well (dinner & kid time)
C[pete: Have you tried using the ""Analyze Game"" feature?
C[pete: my geta wasn't such a good geta.
pete: And now you have probably a better one.
C[pete: back when the F13 group was only three stones, I though I could capture it in a geta
pete: then, J14 looked like a geta for the G14  group
C[pete: A12 kills my group... thought you were going to take that.
C[sirpop: I read everything but A12
C[pete: I was having a horrible time deciding between J10 and B12 a few moves back
pete: Just click it, and you can play out moves to help visualize things
pete: Then click ""back to game"" to get back to the game.
C[pete: although if someone makes a move, you'll be taken out of analysis mode immediately
C[sirpop: Is there such a thing as undo
C[pete: no, there is no undo here
C[sirpop: OK, I'll try to think before  I click.
pete: did you mean to resign?  I wasn't sure that I was that far ahead.
